name: Lumbar Basketweave with Tassel Peach - Threshold™ Designed with Studio McGee
description:
Add refreshing colors to your space with the Lumbar Basketweave with Tassel from Threshold™ Designed with Studio McGee. This peach lumbar pillow features a basketweave-like design with a tassel for textured appeal. Made with a 100% cotton exterior and polyester filling, this lumbar pillow feels soft and comfortable as you rest. The zipper helps create a finished look, while the removable cover allows for easy maintenance.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
